{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/36006?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/schuay/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/schuay/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/schuay/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/schuay/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/schuay", "id": 36006, "login": "schuay", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjM2MDA2", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/schuay/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/schuay/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/schuay/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/schuay/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/schuay/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/schuay", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-45136", "cvss": {"score": 7.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:L/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:H/VI:H/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-78", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection')"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-94", "name": "Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection')"}], "description": "## Summary

`tools/quota-statusline.sh` (introduced in v3.5.0) interpolates Claude Code's hook stdin payload directly into a Python triple-quoted string literal. A `'''` byte sequence in any user-controlled field of the payload closes the literal early and lets following bytes execute as Python in the user's Claude Code process.

## Affected versions

- v3.5.0
- v3.5.1

## Patched versions

- v3.5.2

## Affected configurations

Users who wired `tools/quota-statusline.sh` into Claude Code's `statusLine` configuration. The v3.5.0 README explicitly recommends this setup, so most users on v3.5.0/v3.5.1 with the recommended setup are affected.

## Attack chain

Claude Code's statusline hook payload reflects user-controlled paths (`cwd`, `workspace.current_dir`, `workspace.project_dir`, `transcript_path`). Apostrophes are legal in POSIX filesystem paths.

1. A hostile directory name containing `'''+payload+'''` lands on disk via any normal vector — `git clone`, archive extraction, npm package, downloaded zip, etc.
2. The victim has the recommended `tools/quota-statusline.sh` wired into their CC `statusLine` config.
3. The victim `cd`s anywhere a hostile path is reachable.
4. CC fires the statusline hook on every redraw. The Python literal closes early. The injected bytes execute as Python in the user's process.

## Severity

Local code execution at user privilege. Persistent re-fire on every statusline redraw. No user interaction beyond `cd`-ing into the hostile path. The user's shell, CC session, files, SSH keys, and any locally-accessible credentials are reachable from the executed code.

## Vulnerable pattern

```sh
input=$(cat)
result=$(python3 -c "
    stdin_data = json.loads('''$input''') if '''$input''' else {}
")
```

## Fix

Capture stdin in bash, export to env, and pipe the Python source through a single-quoted heredoc (`<<'PYEOF'`). Single-quoting disables ALL bash interpolation inside the body. Python reads the JSON via `os.environ.get('CC_INPUT')`, where the bytes are inert at every layer.

```sh
CC_INPUT=$(cat)
export CC_INPUT

python3 <<'PYEOF' 2>/dev/null
import os, json
try:
    cc_input = json.loads(os.environ.get('CC_INPUT') or '{}')
except Exception:
    cc_input = {}
# ...
PYEOF
```

## Workarounds

Until upgrading to v3.5.2:

- Disable the statusline by removing the `statusLine` entry from `~/.claude/settings.json`, or
- Replace `tools/quota-statusline.sh` with a script that does NOT pass stdin through `python3 -c "..."` (a heredoc + env var rewrite is safe)

## Credit

Reported by Jakob Linke (@schuay) via GitHub issue [#108](https://github.com/cnighswonger/claude-code-cache-fix/issues/108).

## Timeline

- 2026-05-07 — reported (#108)
- 2026-05-07 — confirmed, fix implemented (#110)
- 2026-05-07 — v3.5.2 published", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00188, "percentile": 0.08577}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-g3xq-3gmv-qq8g", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-13T15:31:41Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-g3xq-3gmv-qq8g", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-g3xq-3gmv-qq8g"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45136"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-27T21:16:18Z", "published_at": "2026-05-13T15:31:41Z", "references": ["https://github.com/cnighswonger/claude-code-cache-fix/security/advisories/GHSA-g3xq-3gmv-qq8g", "https://github.com/cnighswonger/claude-code-cache-fix/issues/108", "https://github.com/cnighswonger/claude-code-cache-fix/pull/110", "https://github.com/cnighswonger/claude-code-cache-fix/commit/613e4df30547f3e6baf32d161eddc828f171da17", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-45136", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-g3xq-3gmv-qq8g"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/cnighswonger/claude-code-cache-fix/security-advisories/GHSA-g3xq-3gmv-qq8g", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/cnighswonger/claude-code-cache-fix", "summary": "claude-code-cache-fix vulnerable to local code execution via Python triple-quote injection in tools/quota-statusline.sh", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-08T23:54:33Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-g3xq-3gmv-qq8g", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.5.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "claude-code-cache-fix"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.5.0, < 3.5.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: claude-code-cache-fix vulnerable to local code execution via Python triple-quote injection in tools/quota-statusline.sh
